steps.title: Modify the analysis
steps.content: The sentence already has the main verb phrase might yield. The blank should therefore describe the cultural studies analysis, not add another finite verb before the sentence reaches its main verb.

steps.title: Avoid extra finite verbs
steps.content: Choices A, B, and D each insert a finite verb form, creating an ungrammatical extra verb before might yield. The remaining choice uses a participle to modify analysis smoothly. The answer is C.
